records.ety: [L. indemnis unhurt (in- not + damnum hurt, damage) + -fy. Cf. Damn, Damnify.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Indemnified (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Indemnifying (?).]

defs: To save harmless; to secure against loss or damage; to insure.
quotes: The states must at last engage to the merchants here that they will indemnify them from all that shall fall out.

defs: To make restitution or compensation for, as for that which is lost; to make whole; to reimburse; to compensate.
